help.title: Help & support
help.sub: Guides, frequently asked questions, shortcuts and contact

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I send an invoice through e-Factura?
faq.a1: You create the invoice, validate it (CIUS-RO), then "Validate and send to ANAF". The receipt appears in SPV Messages and is archived automatically.
faq.q2: Why does ANAF keep messages for only 60 days?
faq.a2: SPV deletes messages after 60 days. Clarito syncs and archives locally, so you don't lose receipts or notifications.
faq.q3: Which thresholds does the app monitor?
faq.a3: Micro 100,000 EUR (rate 5.0985 = 509,850 lei), VAT registration 395,000 lei (art. 310) and VAT on collection 5,000,000 lei.
faq.q4: D112 — the new model from July 2026?
faq.a4: For reporting months ≥ July 2026 the OPANAF 605/2026 model is used; Clarito switches automatically.
faq.q5: How do I credit (storno) an invoice?
faq.a5: From the validated invoice → "Storno", enter the reason; a credit note with negative values is created and sent separately to ANAF.
